# fastly_service_product_bot_management (Resource)

Enables Bot Management on a service. Product Enablement operates on the service directly rather than a specific service version, so this resource is not tied to a `version` and applies immediately.



## Schema

### Required

- `content_guard` (String) ContentGuard status. Can be either `off` or `on`.
- `service_id` (String) The ID of the service to enable Bot Management on. Changing this value will delete and recreate this resource against the new service.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource (identical to `service_id`).
